_doc: FROZEN Stage-3 ChemPile fine-tuning config (measure L_ret/L_ft/L_pre). Fixed IDENTICALLY across every lambda; only the incoming Stage-2 checkpoint differs. Consumed by StageConfig.from_json.
_provenance_detail: learning rate 5e-5 and the 200M-token budget are EXPLICIT_PAPER for Fig 3a (Section 4.1). Optimizer/betas/clip/precision EXPLICIT_PAPER (Table 5). LR schedule, warmup, global batch, weight decay, seed are NOT separately specified for Stage 3 -> LOCAL_REPRODUCTION_CHOICE: cosine decay with short warmup, global batch matching Stage 2 (480), WD 0.1. No early stopping on MusicPile retention (fixed 200M budget); identical ChemPile data order across conditions.
